title: rhododendron coriaceum
intro: Rhododendron coriaceum, also known as the leatherleaf rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Rhododendron coriaceum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to make herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures. Additionally, it has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions due to its astringent properties, making it a valuable plant in herbal medicine.
